recommendations.title: Branded to Kill
recommendations.overview: After botching his latest assignment, a third-ranked Japanese hit man becomes the target of another assassin.

recommendations.title: Emmanuelle: Queen of Sados
recommendations.overview: A woman struggles to keep her stepdaughter from harms way after she hires an assassin to kill her husband, but the hitman turns and blackmails her for the crime.

recommendations.title: The Big 4
recommendations.overview: A by-the-book female detective teams up with four down-on-their-luck assassins to investigate her father's murder.

recommendations.title: Gunpowder Milkshake
recommendations.overview: To protect an 8-year-old girl, a dangerous assassin reunites with her mother and her lethal associates to take down a ruthless crime syndicate and its army of henchmen.

recommendations.title: Birds of Prey (and the Fantabulous Emancipation of One Harley Quinn)
recommendations.overview: Harley Quinn joins forces with a singer, an assassin and a police detective to help a young girl who had a hit placed on her after she stole a rare diamond from a crime lord.

recommendations.title: Wind River
recommendations.overview: An FBI agent teams with the town's veteran game tracker to investigate a murder that occurred on a Native American reservation.

recommendations.title: Fabricated City
recommendations.overview: In real life, Kwon Yoo is unemployed, but in the virtual game world he is the best leader. Kwon Yoo is then framed for a murder. With the help of hacker Yeo-wool, he tries to uncover the truth behind the murder case.

recommendations.title: 24 Hours to Live
recommendations.overview: An assassin seeks redemption after being given a second chance at life.

recommendations.title: Female Prisoner #701: Scorpion
recommendations.overview: After being cruelly set up and deceived by Sugimi, a detective in cahoots with the mob with whom she was whole-heartedly in love, Matsushima’s desire for revenge knows no bounds.

recommendations.title: Colors of Evil: Red
recommendations.overview: When a girl's body is found on a beach in Poland's Tricity, a prosecutor teams up with the victim's mother on an impassioned quest for the truth.
